---
title: &TITLE Alun Rees-Lindley
last: Rees-Lindley
first: Alun
subtitle: "Statistical Methodologist @ ONS"
people_group: "external"
email: "alun.rees-lindley@outlook.com"
education:
  - PhD Fusion Energy | University of Warwick <br> MSc Fusion Energy | University of York <br> MPhys Physics | Durham University
description: "This is not used in this template"
image: AlunReesLindley.png
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
about: 
  id: about
  template: solana
  image-shape: rectangle
  image: AlunReesLindley.png
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:alun.rees-lindley@outlook.com
editor: 'source'
---

<hr>

::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}
:::

<br>

## Background & Research Interests

I work as a statistical methodologist at the Office for National Statistics, specialising in time series analysis. I'm interested in developing and investigating the use of innovative methods for analysing various sports.

## {{< meta first >}}'s blogs

::: {#blogs}
:::

<br>

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
